message:
feat(twilio): add webhook parsing and signature validation operations

Add 4 new operations: webhook.validate_signature, webhook.parse_sms_event,
webhook.parse_status_callback, webhook.parse_voice_event. All are local-only
operations (no HTTP calls) that parse tainted inbound webhook payloads into
typed events. Twilio connector now has 39 operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:22cff6c8b1213cbf0800cec3a71bd92216183ab59b110da0bfbe20a5a22a1b29"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.twilio"
@@ -2341,6 +2341,213 @@ common_mistakes = []
 examples = ['{"room_sid": "RMxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}']
 related = ["twilio.video.room.get"]
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Operations: Webhook Handling (local-only, no HTTP calls)
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature"]
+description = "Validate an incoming Twilio webhook request signature (local-only)"
+capability = "twilio.webhook"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".rate_limit]
+max = 200
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["url", "params", "signature"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".input_schema.properties.url]
+type = "string"
+description = "The full webhook URL"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".input_schema.properties.params]
+type = "object"
+description = "Form-encoded POST parameters as key-value pairs"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".input_schema.properties.signature]
+type = "string"
+description = "X-Twilio-Signature header value"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".input_schema.properties.auth_token]
+type = "string"
+description = "Twilio auth token for HMAC computation"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".output_schema.properties.valid]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".output_schema.properties.reason]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.validate_signature".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Validate an incoming Twilio webhook signature before processing. Local-only, no HTTP call."
+common_mistakes = ["Not using the full URL including protocol and query string."]
+examples = ['{"url": "https://example.com/webhook", "params": {"Body": "Hello"}, "signature": "abc=="}']
+related = ["twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event", "twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event"]
+description = "Parse a Twilio SMS webhook payload into a structured event (local-only)"
+capability = "twilio.webhook"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".rate_limit]
+max = 200
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["body"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".input_schema.properties.body]
+type = "object"
+description = "Webhook payload fields (MessageSid, From, To, Body, etc.)"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.event_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.event_type]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.message_sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.from]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.to]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.body]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.num_media]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".output_schema.properties.tainted]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Parse an incoming SMS/MMS webhook from Twilio into a typed event. Local-only."
+common_mistakes = ["Not validating the signature before trusting the payload."]
+examples = ['{"body": {"MessageSid": "SMxxx", "From": "+15551234567", "To": "+15559876543", "Body": "Hello"}}']
+related = ["twilio.webhook.validate_signature", "twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback"]
+description = "Parse a Twilio status callback payload into a structured event (local-only)"
+capability = "twilio.webhook"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".rate_limit]
+max = 200
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["body"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".input_schema.properties.body]
+type = "object"
+description = "Status callback fields (MessageSid/CallSid, MessageStatus/CallStatus, etc.)"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.event_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.event_type]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.resource_sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.resource_type]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.error_code]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".output_schema.properties.tainted]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Parse a delivery status callback into a typed event. Local-only."
+common_mistakes = ["Confusing SMS status callbacks with voice status callbacks."]
+examples = ['{"body": {"MessageSid": "SMxxx", "MessageStatus": "delivered"}}']
+related = ["twilio.webhook.validate_signature", "twilio.webhook.parse_sms_event"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event"]
+description = "Parse a Twilio voice webhook payload into a structured event (local-only)"
+capability = "twilio.webhook"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".rate_limit]
+max = 200
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["body"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".input_schema.properties.body]
+type = "object"
+description = "Voice webhook fields (CallSid, From, To, CallStatus, Direction, etc.)"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.event_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.event_type]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.call_sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.from]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.to]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.call_status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.direction]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".output_schema.properties.tainted]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.webhook.parse_voice_event".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Parse an incoming voice call webhook from Twilio into a typed event. Local-only."
+common_mistakes = ["Not validating the signature before trusting the payload."]
+examples = ['{"body": {"CallSid": "CAxxx", "From": "+15551234567", "To": "+15559876543", "CallStatus": "ringing"}}']
+related = ["twilio.webhook.validate_signature", "twilio.webhook.parse_status_callback"]
+
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Streaming / Event Capabilities
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

 burst = 20
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twilio.webhook"
+description = "Webhook handling operations (local-only)"
+requests = 200
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 50
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "twilio.send_message" = ["twilio.message"]
 "twilio.get_message" = ["twilio.read"]
@@ -2463,3 +2678,7 @@ scope = "instance"
 "twilio.video.room.end" = ["twilio.video"]
 "twilio.video.room.participants" = ["twilio.video"]

+"twilio.webhook.validate_signature" = ["twilio.webhook"]

@@ -351,6 +351,96 @@ pub struct VideoMeta {

 }
 
+// ── Webhook Event Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+/// Result of validating a Twilio webhook request signature.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct SignatureValidationResult {
+    /// Whether the signature format is valid.
+    pub valid: bool,
+    /// Human-readable reason for the validation result.
+    pub reason: String,
+}
+
+/// Parsed SMS/MMS webhook event from Twilio.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct SmsWebhookEvent {
+    /// Unique event identifier (derived from MessageSid).
+    pub event_id: String,
+    /// Event type (always "sms.inbound").
+    pub event_type: String,
+    /// The Message SID.
+    pub message_sid: String,
+    /// Sender phone number (E.164).
+    pub from: String,
+    /// Recipient phone number (E.164).
+    pub to: String,
+    /// Message body text.
+    pub body: Option<String>,
+    /// Number of media attachments.
+    pub num_media: Option<u32>,
+    /// Account SID.
+    pub account_sid: Option<String>,
+    /// SMS SID (same as message_sid for SMS).
+    pub sms_sid: Option<String>,
+    /// Number of segments.
+    pub num_segments: Option<String>,
+    /// Inbound content is tainted (from external source).
+    pub tainted: bool,
+}
+
+/// Parsed status callback event from Twilio.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct StatusCallbackEvent {
+    /// Unique event identifier.
+    pub event_id: String,
+    /// Event type (e.g. "message.status" or "call.status").
+    pub event_type: String,
+    /// The resource SID (MessageSid or CallSid).
+    pub resource_sid: String,
+    /// Resource type ("message" or "call").
+    pub resource_type: String,
+    /// Status value (e.g. "delivered", "failed", "completed").
+    pub status: String,
+    /// Timestamp of the callback (if available).
+    pub timestamp: Option<String>,
+    /// Error code (if the status indicates an error).
+    pub error_code: Option<String>,
+    /// Error message (if available).
+    pub error_message: Option<String>,
+    /// Inbound content is tainted.
+    pub tainted: bool,
+}
+
+/// Parsed voice webhook event from Twilio.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct VoiceWebhookEvent {
+    /// Unique event identifier (derived from CallSid).
+    pub event_id: String,
+    /// Event type (always "voice.inbound").
+    pub event_type: String,
+    /// The Call SID.
+    pub call_sid: String,
+    /// Caller phone number (E.164).
+    pub from: String,
+    /// Called phone number (E.164).
+    pub to: String,
+    /// Call status (e.g. "ringing", "in-progress").
+    pub call_status: Option<String>,
+    /// Call direction (e.g. "inbound").
+    pub direction: Option<String>,
+    /// Account SID.
+    pub account_sid: Option<String>,
+    /// Caller city (if available from Twilio lookup).
+    pub caller_city: Option<String>,
+    /// Caller state.
+    pub caller_state: Option<String>,
+    /// Caller country.
+    pub caller_country: Option<String>,
+    /// Inbound content is tainted.
+    pub tainted: bool,
+}
+
 #[cfg(test)]
 mod tests {
     use super::*;
